articles.title: ‘It’s pure excitement’: What James Hagens said after first practice with Bruins
articles.description:
“[I] grew up working for this my whole life."

The post ‘It’s pure excitement’: What James Hagens said after first practice with Bruins appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: James Hagens participated in his first practice with the Bruins on April 9, 2026.
Hagens expressed lifelong dedication to hockey, highlighting his passion for the sport.
Local fans can expect increased excitement as Hagens joins the Bruins' roster.

articles.title: Report: 76ers star Joel Embiid to undergo surgery for appendicitis
articles.description:
It's unclear how long the 76ers star will be out.

The post Report: 76ers star Joel Embiid to undergo surgery for appendicitis appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: 76ers star Joel Embiid will undergo surgery for appendicitis.
The duration of his recovery is currently unknown.
Celtics fans may see a weakened 76ers team in upcoming games.

articles.title: State commits $4M to address substance use crisis at Mass. and Cass
articles.description:
The funding will support housing, treatment, and diversion programs in Boston’s hardest-hit area.

The post State commits $4M to address substance use crisis at Mass. and Cass appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: State allocates $4 million to combat substance use crisis at Mass. and Cass.
Funding will enhance housing, treatment, and diversion programs in Boston's most affected area.
Local residents will benefit from improved support services and reduced public health risks.
